title: Mental Health Check-In
description: A gentle daily check-in to track your mood, energy, and mental wellness
viralHook: Started doing daily mental health check-ins and it genuinely changed how I understand myself

props.title: Daily Mental Health Check-In
props.subtitle: Take a moment to pause and reflect. There are no wrong answers.

fields.label: How are you feeling right now?
How did you sleep last night?

options.label: Medium - Some worries on my mind
High - Feeling overwhelmed or on edge

fields.label: Name 3 things you're grateful for today
fields.helpText: Gratitude practice has been shown to improve mood and overall well-being. Even small things count!

fields.label: What's your intention for today?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Be patient with myself, Stay present, Take breaks...
fields.helpText: Setting a daily intention helps you stay grounded and focused on what matters.

successMessage.title: Check-in Complete!
successMessage.body: You just did something really important by pausing to check in with yourself. Remember: every feeling is valid, and taking this small step is an act of self-care. You're doing better than you think.
encouragements: You showed up for yourself today. That takes courage.
Awareness is the first step to wellness. You're on the right path.
Be as kind to yourself as you would be to a good friend.
Progress isn't always linear. Every check-in is a win.
You matter, and how you feel matters. Thank you for being honest with yourself.

props.privacyNote: Your responses are private and stored only on your device. This tool is not a substitute for professional mental health support. If you are in crisis, please reach out to the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline by calling or texting 988.
